{{CargoClone
|name=Master Legalist
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=196
|gene1={race} DEF +50
|gene2={race} FTH +50
|gene3=Each round, {race} DEF +30
|gene4=Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle:
> Troop Earth DMG +6
|gene5=Zombie Minion Skin DEF +30%
|gene6=Per 60 Zombie Minions in battle:
> Troop Earth DMG +10
|gene7=Zombie Minion Skin DEF +50%
|}}
